title: Algerian Wrap Bowl
description: A flavorful Algerian-inspired wrap bowl filled with glassy vegetables, creamy tahini sauce, and crispy wrap pieces.

ingredients.name: tahini
ingredients.notes: mix with lemon juice and water to thin out

ingredients.name: wrap
ingredients.notes: cut into small pieces for garnish

instructions: Toss the glassy carrots and cucumbers with olive oil, salt, and pepper. Spread on a baking sheet and roast for 20 minutes.
In a small bowl, mix together the tahini, lemon juice, and water to thin out the sauce.
Warm the algerian flatbread pieces in the oven for 5 minutes.
Assemble the wrap bowl by placing a portion of the roasted vegetables on the flatbread, followed by a drizzle of tahini sauce and garnish with wrap pieces.
